name: phonebookbackend
description: Simple REST API for a phonebook

scripts.build:ui: rm -rf dist && cd ../../PART_2/PhoneBook && npm run build && cp -r dist ../../PART3/PhonebookBackend
scripts.deploy:full: npm run build:ui && git add . && git commit -m "uibuild" && git push

author: Lurhakongola
